copypastas.text: FML Tournament, hosted by fl0m! Sit back, relax, and watch the action unfold. It’s not just about the kills — it’s about the grand prize: a 2017 Toyota Prius. While other tournaments give away cash, fl0m’s bringing you a ride that’s smooth, silent, and efficient. Hybrid engine, 53 MPG, and zero noise — just like his rotations. Watch the FML tournament, where the gameplay is loud and the prize is quiet. Winning never sounded so smooth.

honse MUGA FORFRODO Sons of Gondor! Of Rohan! My brothers. I see in your eyes the same fear that would take the heart of me. A day may come when the courage of Men fails, when we forsake our friends and break all bonds of fellowship, but it is not this day. An hour of wolves and shattered shields when the Age of Men comes crashing down, but it is not this day! This day we fight! By all that you hold dear on this good earth, I bid you stand, Men of the West! FORFRODO MUGA

So you start reading a copy pasta... wondering when it will get good. It's a large wall of text, there must be something of substance somewhere in here, right? You scroll up to stop the chat elevator so you can finish reading it. But then you realize... It's just a waste of your time. It's just a large wall of text that is completely useless. It's a waste of everyone's time... Regardless, you highlight the text, Ctrl+C, Ctrl+V and hit Enter...

FML Tournament – Hosted by fl0m. Yeah, there’s a LAN going on, but let’s be honest — you’re not here for the CS. You’re here for the pizza. The wings. The nachos that are somehow still warm 3 hours later. Watch the tournament if you want, but the real competition is who can act like they don’t want the last slice. FML — where the snacks are the only thing getting fragged. 🍕 (Also fl0m will pop a tiddy)
